message:
test(proptest): add property tests for runtime_performance_contract

- proptest_runtime_performance_contract.rs: 40 property tests covering serde
  roundtrips, OperationCategory label invariants, PercentileThresholds
  satisfied_by/headroom logic (reflexive, positive/negative, at target),
  evaluate_operation (latency/throughput/startup/regression), RegressionReport
  verdict (pass/conditional/fail, counts, missing benchmarks), standard
  contract invariants (categories, unique IDs, critical ops, ordered latency)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
